pool.baseline: the house is just so quiet now. i walk into the kitchen and i forget for a second that he isnt there, and then it hits me all over again. i dont even know why i bother waking up. there is nothing left for me here. it just feels like i'm a ghost walking through a life that ended months ago.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of the deep field from the james webb telescope and it just hit me... everything we do, every single thing, is just a tiny, meaningless blip. in a billion years none of this will even exist. it feels like we're all just fighting for nothing.

pool.baseline: i don't even know why i'm still doing this. the lab results came back today and it's just... another dead end. my funding is basically gone by next semester and i feel like i've wasted years of my life on nothing. i'm just so incredibly tired of fighting for a future that clearly doesn't want me.

pool.baseline: The candle flickers low, much like the very essence of my soul. He is gone, and with him, the light of my world has been extinguished forever. pool.baseline: everything is gone. the market crash wiped out the last of the funding and the debt collectors are already calling. i put everything into this company... my house, my savings, everything. i dont even know how i'm supposed to look my family in the eye. the shame is just... it's too much. i feel like there's no way back from this.

pool.baseline: everything is just getting so heavy lately. my joints ache, i can barely walk to the kitchen without needing a rest, and i see the look on my daughter's face when she has to help me get dressed. she's so tired. i just feel like i'm making everyone's life so much harder by just... being here.

pool.baseline: i used to feel like my music was actually my soul... like it was the only thing making me real. but it's just gone. everything is just quiet and empty now. i feel like a hollow shell, just walking around but there's nothing actually inside anymore.

pool.baseline: it just feels like everyone hates me. i saw the group chats today and they werent even hiding it anymore. like literally everyone is just laughing at me and waiting for me to mess up. i cant even walk down the hall without feeling like they're all staring at my back. i just want to disappear honestly. everything is so heavy and there's no point in even trying to fix it anymore.

pool.baseline: is it weird to feel like you're not even really here? like i spend all day staring at these screens and talking to people via text/slack but if i just stopped... if i just stopped showing up online or answering anything... i feel like the world wouldn't even pause for a second. just a little less static in the background.

pool.baseline: i’ve been sitting here at the edge of the Grand Canyon for like three hours now. it’s beautiful i guess. i finally made it to all the spots on my bucket list. but honestly? it feels like i’ve seen enough. like i've checked all the boxes and there isn't really any more road left for me to walk. just feels like i'm at the end of the itinerary.

pool.baseline: it's all gone. the last ten years... all those papers, the grants, the theories... they were all based on a fundamental error i just realized. i've spent my whole life building a monument to a lie. i look in the mirror and i don't even see a person, just a fraud. there's nothing left for me here.
